nasb.text: “Blessed are those who have been persecuted for the sake of righteousness, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.

esv.text: “Blessed are those who are persecuted for righteousness’ sake, for     theirs is the kingdom of heaven.

cnv.text: 為義遭受迫害的人有福了， 因為天國是他們的。

ccb.text: 为义受迫害的人有福了， 因为天国是他们的。

csbs.text: 为义受逼迫的人是蒙福的， 因为天国是他们的。
